meaning: n.近海(视野范围内的海面)
examples: I hear there are more staff changes in the offing.
Diels is trying to cut down the size and says that a laser around the size of a small table is in the offing.
Some think a dynasty is in the offing.
And a decision to head back into Super Bowl advertising could be in the offing.
Many of the pending rules have been in the offing since the 1990 Clean Air Act.
